title: Lissi Aroma London Soy Candle (Smoked Cedar & Pine-Large Natural Soy Candle, 80 Hours Burning Time, Cotton Wicked Candle，Cedar and Pine Candle, Aromatherapy Candle Gifts, Luxury Candles for Home
features: PREMIUM MATERIALS: Handcrafted with 100% natural soy wax and pure essential oils, housed in an elegant clear glass jar with a beautifully crafted wooden lid
LONG-LASTING FRAGRANCE: Crimson pomegranate scent creates a luxurious atmosphere with rich, fruity notes that fill your space with warmth
EXTENDED BURN TIME: Impressive 80-hour burn time ensures long-lasting enjoyment of this premium candle's delightful aroma
ELEGANT DESIGN: Clear glass container with wooden lid complement any décor, making it perfect for both home use and gifting
GENEROUS SIZE: 320g candle provides ample burning time while maintaining a sophisticated presence in any room
description: Product description Indulge your senses with this luxurious Crimson Pomegranate candle from LISSI AROMA London. Handcrafted with 100% natural soy wax and infused with premium essential oils, this elegant candle offers an impressive 80-hour burn time. The sophisticated clear glass jar is complemented by a natural wooden lid, making it a stylish addition to any room. Each 320g candle is meticulously made to ensure a consistent, long-lasting fragrance that captures the essence of sweet, tangy pomegranate. The clean-burning formulation provides a superior scent throw while maintaining its quality throughout use. Perfect for creating a warm, inviting atmosphere in your living space, this candle combines contemporary design with traditional craftsmanship. The generous size and premium quality make it an ideal gift or a delightful treat for yourself. Store in a cool, dry place and trim the wick before each use for optimal burning. Safety Warning Always trim the wick before lighting. Keep away from direct sunlight and flammable materials. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Burn for no more than 4 hours at a time. Discontinue use when 1/4 inch of wax remains.
